{"society_power": 2.0, "state_power": 7.5, "society_change": -4.5, "state_change": 5.5, "key_event": "Clerical consolidation, Iran-Iraq War, and purge of opposition", "reasoning": "The revolutionary mobilization of the 1970s was crushed as the clerical regime built pervasive coercive institutions (IRGC, Basij, revolutionary courts) and used the war to eliminate rivals and demobilize society; the state consolidated into a strong Despotic Leviathan while independent associations, parties, and press were dismantled."}
